endpoints.name: Gets a list of managed clusters in the specified subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets a list of managed clusters in the specified subscription. The operation returns properties of each managed cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Lists managed clusters in the specified subscription and resource group.
endpoints.description: Lists managed clusters in the specified subscription and resource group. The operation returns properties of each managed cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets a managed cluster.
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the managed cluster with a specified resource group and name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a managed cluster.
endpoints.description: Deletes the managed cluster with a specified resource group and name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets access profile of a managed cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROLENAME}} with a real rolename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets an access profile of a managed cluster.
endpoints.description: Gets the accessProfile for the specified role name of the managed cluster with a specified resource group and name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{ROLENAME}} with a real rolename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets upgrade profile for a managed cluster.
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the upgrade profile for a managed cluster with a specified resource group and name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
